runners.formComment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished 5th in a Grade 5 on March 27 over 320m at Richmond behind Brooklyn Brute beaten 8 lengths (18.72). Forward showing expected.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished 5th in a Grade 5 on March 27 over 320m at Richmond behind Brooklyn Brute beaten 8 lengths (18.72). Forward showing expected.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Went up with the lids as the start was effected.

runners.formComment: Missed the frame when seventh (30.49) at Richmond at last run and returns here after a 12 weeks break. One of the major contenders.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame when seventh (30.49) at Richmond at last run and returns here after a 12 weeks break. One of the major contenders.

runners.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and drifts back in his races. The latest effort was a 9 length sixth over 340m at this track. Not one of the leading chances on this occasion.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and drifts back in his races. The latest effort was a 9 length sixth over 340m at this track. Not one of the leading chances on this occasion.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off heels entering first turn and lost momentum.
Passing the first turn checked off the back, losing momentum.

runners.formComment: Missed the frame when seventh (21.73) at Nowra at last run and returns here after a 11 weeks break. Looks a strong top-three chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame when seventh (21.73) at Nowra at last run and returns here after a 11 weeks break. Looks a strong top-three chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Heels galloped on in the first turn and lost momentum.
Entering the first turn galloped on heels and lost significant momentum.

runners.formComment: Was out of placings last time (19.35) at Richmond in a Grade 5, finishing fourth and beaten 9 lengths. Goes well out of this box with a win and two minors. Will need the right run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (19.35) at Richmond in a Grade 5, finishing fourth and beaten 9 lengths. Goes well out of this box with a win and two minors. Will need the right run.

runners.formComment: She hasn't been setting the track on fire and faces tougher opposition here. Needs to do more. Others better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: She hasn't been setting the track on fire and faces tougher opposition here. Needs to do more. Others better.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At the first turn hampered, crowded for room and came together.

runners.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th in a Grade 5 on April 12 over 320m at Richmond behind Wighton Banner beaten 8 lengths (19.15). Better than the last couple of runs suggest. Expected to do much better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 6th in a Grade 5 on April 12 over 320m at Richmond behind Wighton Banner beaten 8 lengths (19.15). Better than the last couple of runs suggest. Expected to do much better.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Approaching the first turn hampered, crowded for room and came together.

runners.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and tends to spot them a start in her races, Last start finished fourth over 340m at this track, beaten 11 lengths. Looking to others this time.
